description: The measured gap lives in the color-and-weak-singlet channel (O8 M-probe scope). A singlet gap proves a singlet, never the named electroweak scalar: the M field is a labeled probe convention and can supply neither the weak-doublet direction the completion needs nor any of the 9 lineage rows. The schema must NOT complete the doublet contract; it records the singlet flag as a convention-scoped candidate only.
